seed_instruction: Create an email to a professor introducing yourself and your goals.
org_constraint: Begin the first paragraph with the phrase "I hope this email finds you well."
new_constraint: Begin the first paragraph with a question rather than a greeting.
instruction: Create an email to a professor introducing yourself and your goals. Begin the first paragraph with the phrase "I hope this email finds you well." Begin the first paragraph with a question rather than a greeting.
response:
Subject: Introduction - [Your Name] - Interested in [Professor's Field/Course Name]

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well. As I embark on my studies in [Your Major/Field of Study], I have been particularly fascinated by your research in [Mention a specific area of their research or a topic you are interested in related to their work]. I am writing to you today to introduce myself and express my sincere interest in [mention the specific class you are taking or an area of their expertise that interests you].

My academic background has provided me with a strong foundation in [mention 1-2 relevant skills or courses, e.g., quantitative analysis, literature review, programming]. Moving forward, my primary academic goal is to [State a broad, meaningful goal, e.g., pursue a career in sustainable energy policy, deeply understand the mechanics of early modern literature, develop advanced skills in machine learning]. I am especially eager to gain deeper insight into [Mention a specific skill or knowledge area that their course/research offers].

I have been following your work on [mention a specific paper, project, or talk if possible, otherwise keep it general] and found it incredibly insightful. I believe that the concepts covered in [Course Name] would be instrumental in helping me achieve my goal of [reiterate goal briefly].

If your schedule permits, I would be grateful for the opportunity to briefly meet with you during your office hours sometime this semester to discuss [mention a specific topic, e.g., your research, potential areas of undergraduate research, or advice on navigating the field].

Thank you very much for your time and consideration. I look forward to the possibility of learning from you this semester.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Student ID Number]
[Your Email Address]<turn|>
